subcodes.first_line: O Lord and my Hope! I beseech Thee, by Thy all-encompassing and all-subduing sovereignty over every contingent being, to aid Thy servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی اسئلک بسیطرتک المحیطة المستولیة علی الکائنات ان تنصر عبادک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @living waters; water of life
